fault_hypothesis: The function calculates the new expiration time on line 75 but fails to update the cache with this new value before returning on line 76. A statement to update the cache entry is missing.

constraints.intent: Checks a data-driven property on time-to-expiry that separates the given passing and failing test runs.
The cache entry for the given key should be updated with the newly computed expiration time.
An entry must be valid (not expired) for its TTL to be extended.
